importlib.util/machinery/DEBUG_BYTECODE_.name: DEBUG_BYTECODE_SUFFIXES
importlib.util/machinery/DEBUG_BYTECODE_.description: A list of strings representing the file suffixes for non-optimized bytecode modules. Added in version 3.3. Deprecated since version 3.5: Use BYTECODE_SUFFIXES instead.

info.excerpt: A list of strings representing the file suffixes for non-optimized bytecode modules. Added in version 3.3. Deprecated since version 3.5: Use BYTECODE_SUFFIXES instead.

importlib.util/decode_source.name: decode_source
importlib.util/decode_source.description: Decode the given bytes representing source code and return it as a string with universal newlines (as required by importlib.abc.InspectLoader.get_source()). Added in version 3.4.

info.excerpt: Decode the given bytes representing source code and return it as a string with universal newlines (as required by importlib.abc.InspectLoader.get_source()). Added in version 3.4.
